pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and task description defining the target file.
Verified against verifier.py which scores 35 points and requires 'matches >= 3' for successful patient text extraction.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires exporting a patient list to a PDF saved exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/patient_roster.pdf'. Verification involves analyzing the PDF's text to ensure at least 3 actual patient names from the synthetic FreeMED database (generated using Synthea) are present in the document. The verifier also checks PDF metadata to confirm it was generated by a browser engine.
